hints.bold:
Win 5 rounds to win the match.

In the tutorial, you start with 2 wins.

Breath is the energy used to play cards.

You start with 1 breath and gain 1 more each round.
Mouse over each number and keyword on a card to learn more.

Dove costs 1 breath to play and earns 1 point.

Mouse over its keywords to learn more.
Dash is worth 3 points, minus 1 for each card that was played before it.
Mercy draws cards when it resolves, not when it's played.

Start each match with 3 cards in hand.

Your max hand size is 6.
When you're ready, click a card in your hand to add it to the story.

Your opponent has played a card, too.

Your can't see the cards they play until nighttime.

You don't have enough breath to play another card, so you must pass.

Once both players pass, night begins, and the cards in the story resolve from left to right.

A new round begins, both players draw 2 cards.

Max breath goes up by 1, and refills completely.
Playing Dash here earns 3 points, an exceptionally strong play in round 2.
You're on your own for the rest of this match, good luck!

night.bold:
Both players earned 1 point, so it's a tie!

Click the moon when you're ready for the next round to begin.

Another round ends.

Click the moon to continue.

hints.bold: If you play a card with Inspire, you will have extra breath on the next round.

This round you're Inspired for 1 extra breath.

Inspired and other statuses appear above your hand.

With your 3 breath you can afford Mercy.

Consider saving Stars as it would put you at 5 breath next round, not enough to play Uprising.
Sometimes it's better to pass instead of playing a card. Click the sun to pass.
A round only ends when both players pass in a row.

Dove probably isn't enough to win this round.

But if you play enough Stars you can play Uprising next round to win for sure!

You draw cards from your deck, which starts with 15 cards in it.

Click your deck to see everything in it.
When cards resolve, they go to the discard pile.
If your deck is empty when you would draw a card, your discard pile is shuffled to form a new deck.

Fruit gives Nourish when it resolves.

Nourish will make the next card you resolve worth extra points, even if it's played on a future round.
From here on it's up to you, show me what you've learned!
